verses.text: After Joshua, Judah goes up first and defeats the Canaanites. Judah first. The conquest continues.
After Joshua, Judah goes up first and defeats the Canaanites. Judah first. The conquest continues.
After Joshua, Judah goes up first and defeats the Canaanites. Judah first. The conquest continues.
After Joshua, Judah goes up first and defeats the Canaanites. Judah first. The conquest continues.
Adoni-bezek is caught and confesses God's justice. Justice. He reaps what he sowed.
Adoni-bezek is caught and confesses God's justice. Justice. He reaps what he sowed.

Judah takes Jerusalem, Hebron, and the south. Victory. The tribe presses on.
Judah takes Jerusalem, Hebron, and the south. Victory. The tribe presses on.

Caleb gives Achsah to Othniel; she asks for springs. Achsah. A fuller blessing is sought.
Caleb gives Achsah to Othniel; she asks for springs. Achsah. A fuller blessing is sought.

The Kenites and Judah take more cities. Advance. The land is being won.
The Kenites and Judah take more cities. Advance. The land is being won.
The Kenites and Judah take more cities. Advance. The land is being won.
Judah could not drive out those with iron chariots. Failure. Fear limits faith.
Judah could not drive out those with iron chariots. Failure. Fear limits faith.

Joseph takes Bethel by a man's help. Bethel. Mercy is shown the helper.

Manasseh and Ephraim leave Canaanites among them. Incomplete. Compromise begins.

Zebulun, Asher, and Naphtali do likewise. Tribute. They settle for less.

The Amorites press Dan into the mountain. Pressed. Disobedience costs them.
